types.name: AppBskyActorDefsNux
types.doc: A new user experiences (NUX) storage object

fields.name: data
fields.doc: Arbitrary data for the NUX. The structure is defined by the NUX itself. Limited to 300 characters.

fields.name: expiresAt
fields.doc: The date and time at which the NUX will expire and should be considered completed.

types.name: AppBskyActorDefsMutedWord
types.doc: A word that the account owner has muted.

fields.name: value
fields.doc: The muted word itself.

fields.name: expiresAt
fields.doc: The date and time at which the muted word will expire and no longer be applied.

fields.name: actorTarget
fields.doc: Groups of users to apply the muted word to. If undefined, applies to all users.

types.name: ComAtprotoLabelDefsLabel
types.doc: Metadata tag on an atproto resource (eg, repo or record).

fields.name: cid
fields.doc: Optionally, CID specifying the specific version of 'uri' resource this label applies to.

fields.name: cts
fields.doc: Timestamp when this label was created.

fields.name: exp
fields.doc: Timestamp at which this label expires (no longer applies).

fields.name: neg
fields.doc: If true, this is a negation label, overwriting a previous label.

fields.name: sig
fields.doc: Signature of dag-cbor encoded label.

fields.name: src
fields.doc: DID of the actor who created this label.

fields.name: uri
fields.doc: AT URI of the record, repository (account), or other resource that this label applies to.

fields.name: val
fields.doc: The short string name of the value or type of this label.

fields.name: status
fields.doc: The status for the account.

fields.name: isActive
fields.doc: True if the status is not expired, false if it is expired. Only present if expiration was set.

fields.name: expiresAt
fields.doc: The date when this status will expire. The application might choose to no longer return the status after expiration.

fields.name: isDisabled
fields.doc: True if the user's go-live access has been disabled by a moderator, false otherwise.

types.name: AppBskyActorDefsVerificationView
types.doc: An individual verification for an associated subject.

fields.name: uri
fields.doc: The AT-URI of the verification record.

fields.name: issuer
fields.doc: The user who issued this verification.

fields.name: isValid
fields.doc: True if the verification passes validation, otherwise false.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.doc: Timestamp when the verification was created.

types.name: AppBskyActorDefsVerificationState
types.doc: Represents the verification information about the user this object is attached to.

fields.name: verifiedStatus
fields.doc: The user's status as a verified account.

fields.name: trustedVerifierStatus
fields.doc: The user's status as a trusted verifier.

types.name: AppBskyActorDefsKnownFollowers
types.doc: The subject's followers whom you also follow

types.name: AppBskyActorDefsViewerState
types.doc: Metadata about the requesting account's relationship with the subject account. Only has meaningful content for authed requests.

fields.name: feed
fields.doc: The URI of the feed, or an identifier which describes the feed.

fields.name: hideReplies
fields.doc: Hide replies in the feed.

fields.name: hideReposts
fields.doc: Hide reposts in the feed.

fields.name: hideQuotePosts
fields.doc: Hide quote posts in the feed.

fields.name: hideRepliesByUnfollowed
fields.doc: Hide replies in the feed if they are not by followed users.

fields.name: sort
fields.doc: Sorting mode for threads.

types.name: AppBskyActorDefsDeclaredAgePref
types.doc: Read-only preference containing value(s) inferred from the user's declared birthdate. Absence of this preference object in the response indicates that the user has not made a declaration.

fields.name: isOverAge13
fields.doc: Indicates if the user has declared that they are over 13 years of age.

fields.name: isOverAge16
fields.doc: Indicates if the user has declared that they are over 16 years of age.

fields.name: isOverAge18
fields.doc: Indicates if the user has declared that they are over 18 years of age.

types.name: AppBskyActorDefsBskyAppProgressGuide
types.doc: If set, an active progress guide. Once completed, can be set to undefined. Should have unspecced fields tracking progress.

types.name: AppBskyActorDefsBskyAppStatePref
types.doc: A grab bag of state that's specific to the bsky.app program. Third-party apps shouldn't use this.

fields.name: labelerDid
fields.doc: Which labeler does this preference apply to? If undefined, applies globally.

types.name: AppBskyActorDefsVerificationPrefs
types.doc: Preferences for how verified accounts appear in the app.

fields.name: hideBadges
fields.doc: Hide the blue check badges for verified accounts and trusted verifiers.

fields.name: birthDate
fields.doc: The birth date of account owner.

types.name: AppBskyActorDefsLiveEventPreferences
types.doc: Preferences for live events.

fields.name: hideAllFeeds
fields.doc: Whether to hide all feeds from live events.

types.name: AppBskyActorDefsPostInteractionSettingsPref
types.doc: Default post interaction settings for the account. These values should be applied as default values when creating new posts. These refs should mirror the threadgate and postgate records exactly.

types.name: AppBskyEmbedExternal
types.doc: A representation of some externally linked content (eg, a URL and 'card'), embedded in a Bluesky record (eg, a post).

fields.name: status
fields.doc: The status for the account.

types.name: AppBskyAgeassuranceDefsEvent
types.doc: Object used to store Age Assurance data in stash.

fields.name: email
fields.doc: The email used for Age Assurance.

fields.name: access
fields.doc: The access level granted based on Age Assurance data we've processed.

fields.name: initIp
fields.doc: The IP address used when initiating the Age Assurance flow.

fields.name: initUa
fields.doc: The user agent used when initiating the Age Assurance flow.

fields.name: status
fields.doc: The status of the Age Assurance process.

fields.name: attemptId
fields.doc: The unique identifier for this instance of the Age Assurance flow, in UUID format.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.doc: The date and time of this write operation.

fields.name: completeIp
fields.doc: The IP address used when completing the Age Assurance flow.

fields.name: completeUa
fields.doc: The user agent used when completing the Age Assurance flow.

fields.name: regionCode
fields.doc: The ISO 3166-2 region code provided when beginning the Age Assurance flow.

fields.name: countryCode
fields.doc: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code provided when beginning the Age Assurance flow.

types.name: AppBskyAgeassuranceDefsState
types.doc: The user's computed Age Assurance state.

fields.name: lastInitiatedAt
fields.doc: The timestamp when this state was last updated.

types.name: AppBskyAgeassuranceDefsConfigRegion
types.doc: The Age Assurance configuration for a specific region.

fields.name: regionCode
fields.doc: The ISO 3166-2 region code this configuration applies to. If omitted, the configuration applies to the entire country.

fields.name: countryCode
fields.doc: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code this configuration applies to.

types.name: AppBskyAgeassuranceDefsStateMetadata
types.doc: Additional metadata needed to compute Age Assurance state client-side.

fields.name: accountCreatedAt
fields.doc: The account creation timestamp.

types.name: AppBskyAgeassuranceDefsConfigRegionRuleDefault
types.doc: Age Assurance rule that applies by default.

types.name: AppBskyAgeassuranceDefsConfigRegionRuleIfAssuredOverAge
types.doc: Age Assurance rule that applies if the user has been assured to be equal-to or over a certain age.

types.name: AppBskyAgeassuranceDefsConfigRegionRuleIfAssuredUnderAge
types.doc: Age Assurance rule that applies if the user has been assured to be under a certain age.

types.name: AppBskyAgeassuranceDefsConfigRegionRuleIfDeclaredOverAge
types.doc: Age Assurance rule that applies if the user has declared themselves equal-to or over a certain age.

types.name: AppBskyAgeassuranceDefsConfigRegionRuleIfAccountNewerThan
types.doc: Age Assurance rule that applies if the account is equal-to or newer than a certain date.

fields.name: date
fields.doc: The date threshold as a datetime string.

types.name: AppBskyAgeassuranceDefsConfigRegionRuleIfAccountOlderThan
types.doc: Age Assurance rule that applies if the account is older than a certain date.

fields.name: date
fields.doc: The date threshold as a datetime string.

types.name: AppBskyAgeassuranceDefsConfigRegionRuleIfDeclaredUnderAge
types.doc: Age Assurance rule that applies if the user has declared themselves under a certain age.

types.name: AppBskyBookmarkDefsBookmark
types.doc: Object used to store bookmark data in stash.

fields.name: syncedAt
fields.doc: Last date when contacts where imported.

types.name: AppBskyContactDefsNotification
types.doc: A stash object to be sent via bsync representing a notification to be created.

fields.name: to
fields.doc: The DID of who this notification should go to.

fields.name: from
fields.doc: The DID of who this notification comes from.

types.name: AppBskyContactDefsMatchAndContactIndex
types.doc: Associates a profile with the positional index of the contact import input in the call to `app.bsky.contact.importContacts`, so clients can know which phone caused a particular match.

fields.name: path
fields.doc: Local, on-device ref to file to be embedded. Embeds are currently device-bound for drafts.

types.name: ComAtprotoLabelDefsSelfLabel
types.doc: Metadata tag on an atproto record, published by the author within the record. Note that schemas should use #selfLabels, not #selfLabel.

fields.name: val
fields.doc: The short string name of the value or type of this label.

types.name: ComAtprotoLabelDefsSelfLabels
types.doc: Metadata tags on an atproto record, published by the author within the record.

types.name: AppBskyDraftDefsDraftPost
types.doc: One of the posts that compose a draft.

fields.name: text
fields.doc: The primary post content. It has a higher limit than post contents to allow storing a larger text that can later be refined into smaller posts.

types.name: AppBskyDraftDefsDraft
types.doc: A draft containing an array of draft posts.

fields.name: deviceId
fields.doc: UUIDv4 identifier of the device that created this draft.

fields.name: deviceName
fields.doc: The device and/or platform on which the draft was created.

types.name: AppBskyDraftDefsDraftView
types.doc: View to present drafts data to users.

fields.name: id
fields.doc: A TID to be used as a draft identifier.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.doc: The time the draft was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.doc: The time the draft was last updated.

types.name: AppBskyDraftDefsDraftWithId
types.doc: A draft with an identifier, used to store drafts in private storage (stash).

fields.name: id
fields.doc: A TID to be used as a draft identifier.

types.name: AppBskyEmbedDefsAspectRatio
types.doc: width:height represents an aspect ratio. It may be approximate, and may not correspond to absolute dimensions in any given unit.

fields.name: alt
fields.doc: Alt text description of the image, for accessibility.

fields.name: alt
fields.doc: Alt text description of the image, for accessibility.

fields.name: thumb
fields.doc: Fully-qualified URL where a thumbnail of the image can be fetched. For example, CDN location provided by the App View.

fields.name: fullsize
fields.doc: Fully-qualified URL where a large version of the image can be fetched. May or may not be the exact original blob. For example, CDN location provided by the App View.

fields.name: alt
fields.doc: Alt text description of the video, for accessibility.

fields.name: presentation
fields.doc: A hint to the client about how to present the video.

fields.name: presentation
fields.doc: A hint to the client about how to present the video.

types.name: AppBskyFeedDefsViewerState
types.doc: Metadata about the requesting account's relationship with the subject content. Only has meaningful content for authed requests.

fields.name: reqId
fields.doc: Unique identifier per request that may be passed back alongside interactions.

fields.name: feedContext
fields.doc: Context on a feed item that was originally supplied by the feed generator on getFeedSkeleton.

fields.name: reqId
fields.doc: Unique identifier per request that may be passed back alongside interactions.

fields.name: feedContext
fields.doc: Context provided by feed generator that may be passed back alongside interactions.

types.name: AppBskyRichtextFacetByteSlice
types.doc: Specifies the sub-string range a facet feature applies to. Start index is inclusive, end index is exclusive. Indices are zero-indexed, counting bytes of the UTF-8 encoded text. NOTE: some languages, like Javascript, use UTF-16 or Unicode codepoints for string slice indexing; in these languages, convert to byte arrays before working with facets.

types.name: AppBskyRichtextFacet
types.doc: Annotation of a sub-string within rich text.

types.name: AppBskyFeedDefsThreadContext
types.doc: Metadata about this post within the context of the thread it is in.

fields.name: feedContext
fields.doc: Context that will be passed through to client and may be passed to feed generator back alongside interactions.

fields.name: post
fields.doc: Reference (AT-URI) to the post record.

fields.name: post
fields.doc: Reference (AT-URI) to the post record.

types.name: AppBskyFeedThreadgateListRule
types.doc: Allow replies from actors on a list.

types.name: AppBskyGraphDefsRelationship
types.doc: lists the bi-directional graph relationships between one actor (not indicated in the object), and the target actors (the DID included in the object)

fields.name: blocking
fields.doc: if the actor blocks this DID, this is the AT-URI of the block record

fields.name: blockedBy
fields.doc: if the actor is blocked by this DID, contains the AT-URI of the block record

fields.name: following
fields.doc: if the actor follows this DID, this is the AT-URI of the follow record

fields.name: followedBy
fields.doc: if the actor is followed by this DID, contains the AT-URI of the follow record

fields.name: blockedByList
fields.doc: if the actor is blocked by this DID via a block list, contains the AT-URI of the listblock record

fields.name: blockingByList
fields.doc: if the actor blocks this DID via a block list, this is the AT-URI of the listblock record

types.name: AppBskyGraphDefsNotFoundActor
types.doc: indicates that a handle or DID could not be resolved

types.name: AppBskyGraphGetListsWithMembershipListWithMembership
types.doc: A list and an optional list item indicating membership of a target user to that list.

types.name: AppBskyGraphGetStarterPacksWithMembershipStarterPackWithMembership
types.doc: A starter pack and an optional list item indicating membership of a target user to that starter pack.

types.name: ComAtprotoLabelDefsLabelValueDefinitionStrings
types.doc: Strings which describe the label in the UI, localized into a specific language.

fields.name: lang
fields.doc: The code of the language these strings are written in.

fields.name: name
fields.doc: A short human-readable name for the label.

fields.name: description
fields.doc: A longer description of what the label means and why it might be applied.

types.name: ComAtprotoLabelDefsLabelValueDefinition
types.doc: Declares a label value and its expected interpretations and behaviors.

fields.name: blurs
fields.doc: What should this label hide in the UI, if applied? 'content' hides all of the target; 'media' hides the images/video/audio; 'none' hides nothing.

fields.name: severity
fields.doc: How should a client visually convey this label? 'inform' means neutral and informational; 'alert' means negative and warning; 'none' means show nothing.

fields.name: adultOnly
fields.doc: Does the user need to have adult content enabled in order to configure this label?

fields.name: identifier
fields.doc: The value of the label being defined. Must only include lowercase ascii and the '-' character ([a-z-]+).

fields.name: defaultSetting
fields.doc: The default setting for this label.

types.name: AppBskyNotificationDefsSubjectActivitySubscription
types.doc: Object used to store activity subscription data in stash.

fields.name: reason
fields.doc: The reason why this notification was delivered - e.g. your post was liked, or you received a new follower.

types.name: AppBskyRichtextFacetTag
types.doc: Facet feature for a hashtag. The text usually includes a '#' prefix, but the facet reference should not (except in the case of 'double hash tags').

types.name: AppBskyRichtextFacetLink
types.doc: Facet feature for a URL. The text URL may have been simplified or truncated, but the facet reference should be a complete URL.

types.name: AppBskyRichtextFacetMention
types.doc: Facet feature for mention of another account. The text is usually a handle, including a '@' prefix, but the facet reference is a DID.

fields.name: state
fields.doc: The state of the video processing job. All values not listed as a known value indicate that the job is in process.

fields.name: chatDisabled
fields.doc: Set to true when the actor cannot actively participate in conversations

types.name: ChatBskyActorDefsGroupConvoMember
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here].

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsGroupConvo
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here].

fields.name: name
fields.doc: The display name of the group conversation.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsSystemMessageDataAddMember
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. System message indicating a user was added to the group convo.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogAddMember
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a member was added to a group convo. The member who was added gets a logBeginConvo (to create the convo) but also a logAddMember (to show the system message as the first message the user sees).

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsSystemMessageDataEditGroup
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. System message indicating the group info was edited.

fields.name: newName
fields.doc: Group name that replaced the old.

fields.name: oldName
fields.doc: Group name that was replaced.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogEditGroup
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating info about group convo was edited.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsSystemMessageDataLockConvo
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. System message indicating the group convo was locked.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogLockConvo
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a group convo was locked.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogMuteConvo
types.doc: Event indicating the viewer muted a convo. Can be direct or group.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogReadConvo
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a convo was read up to a certain message.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogBeginConvo
types.doc: Event indicating a convo containing the viewer was started. Can be direct or group. When a member is added to a group convo, they also get this event.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogLeaveConvo
types.doc: Event indicating the viewer left a convo. Can be direct or group.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsSystemMessageDataMemberJoin
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. System message indicating a user joined the group convo via join link.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogMemberJoin
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a member joined a group convo via join link. The member who was added gets a logBeginConvo (to create the convo) but also a logMemberJoin (to show the system message as the first message the user sees).

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogAcceptConvo
types.doc: Event indicating the viewer accepted a convo, and it can be moved out of the request inbox. Can be direct or group.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogAddReaction
types.doc: Event indicating a reaction was added to a message.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsSystemMessageDataMemberLeave
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. System message indicating a user voluntarily left the group convo.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogMemberLeave
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a member voluntarily left a group convo. The member who was removed gets a logLeaveConvo (to leave the convo) but not a logMemberLeave (because they already left, so can't see the system message).

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogReadMessage
types.doc: DEPRECATED: use logReadConvo instead. Event indicating a convo was read up to a certain message.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsSystemMessageDataUnlockConvo
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. System message indicating the group convo was unlocked.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogUnlockConvo
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a group convo was unlocked.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogUnmuteConvo
types.doc: Event indicating the viewer unmuted a convo. Can be direct or group.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogEditJoinLink
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a settings about a join link for a group convo were edited.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsSystemMessageDataRemoveMember
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. System message indicating a user was removed from the group convo.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogRemoveMember
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a member was removed from a group convo. The member who was removed gets a logLeaveConvo (to leave the convo) but not a logRemoveMember (because they already left, so can't see the system message).

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogCreateMessage
types.doc: Event indicating a user-originated message was created. Is not emitted for system messages.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogDeleteMessage
types.doc: Event indicating a user-originated message was deleted. Is not emitted for system messages.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogCreateJoinLink
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a join link was created for a group convo.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogEnableJoinLink
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a join link was enabled for a group convo.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogRemoveReaction
types.doc: Event indicating a reaction was removed from a message.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsSystemMessageView
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here].

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogDisableJoinLink
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a join link was disabled for a group convo.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogRejectJoinRequest
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a join request was rejected by the viewer. Only the owner gets this.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogApproveJoinRequest
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a join request was approved by the viewer. Only the owner gets this. The approved member gets a logBeginConvo.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogIncomingJoinRequest
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a join request was made to a group the viewer owns. Only the owner gets this.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogOutgoingJoinRequest
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a join request was made by the viewer.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsSystemMessageDataLockConvoPermanently
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. System message indicating the group convo was locked permanently.

types.name: ChatBskyConvoDefsLogLockConvoPermanently
types.doc: [NOTE: This is under active development and should be considered unstable while this note is here]. Event indicating a group convo was locked permanently.

fields.name: handle
fields.doc: The validated handle of the account; or 'handle.invalid' if the handle did not bi-directionally match the DID document.

types.name: ComAtprotoModerationCreateReportModTool
types.doc: Moderation tool information for tracing the source of the action

fields.name: name
fields.doc: Name/identifier of the source (e.g., 'bsky-app/android', 'bsky-web/chrome')

types.name: ComAtprotoRepoApplyWritesCreate
types.doc: Operation which creates a new record.

fields.name: rkey
fields.doc: NOTE: maxLength is redundant with record-key format. Keeping it temporarily to ensure backwards compatibility.

types.name: ComAtprotoRepoApplyWritesDelete
types.doc: Operation which deletes an existing record.

types.name: ComAtprotoRepoApplyWritesUpdate
types.doc: Operation which updates an existing record.

fields.name: hostname
fields.doc: hostname of server; not a URL (no scheme)

fields.name: head
fields.doc: Current repo commit CID

fields.name: status
fields.doc: If active=false, this optional field indicates a possible reason for why the account is not active. If active=false and no status is supplied, then the host makes no claim for why the repository is no longer being hosted.

fields.name: lang
fields.doc: Message language.

fields.name: name
fields.doc: Name of the template.

fields.name: subject
fields.doc: Content of the template, can contain markdown and variable placeholders.

fields.name: lastUpdatedBy
fields.doc: DID of the user who last updated the template.

fields.name: contentMarkdown
fields.doc: Subject of the message, used in emails.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModTool
types.doc: Moderation tool information for tracing the source of the action

fields.name: name
fields.doc: Name/identifier of the source (e.g., 'automod', 'ozone/workspace')

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsAccountStats
types.doc: Statistics about a particular account subject

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsAccountStrike
types.doc: Strike information for an account

fields.name: lastStrikeAt
fields.doc: Timestamp of the most recent strike received

fields.name: firstStrikeAt
fields.doc: Timestamp of the first strike received

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsRecordsStats
types.doc: Statistics about a set of record subject items

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Sticky comment on the subject.

fields.name: appealed
fields.doc: True indicates that the a previously taken moderator action was appealed against, by the author of the content. False indicates last appeal was resolved by moderators.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.doc: Timestamp referencing the first moderation status impacting event was emitted on the subject

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.doc: Timestamp referencing when the last update was made to the moderation status of the subject

fields.name: lastAppealedAt
fields.doc: Timestamp referencing when the author of the subject appealed a moderation action

fields.name: ageAssuranceState
fields.doc: Current age assurance state of the subject.

fields.name: ageAssuranceUpdatedBy
fields.doc: Whether or not the last successful update to age assurance was made by the user or admin.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventTag
types.doc: Add/Remove a tag on a subject

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Additional comment about added/removed tags.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsRecordEvent
types.doc: Logs lifecycle event on a record subject. Normally captured by automod from the firehose and emitted to ozone for historical tracking.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsSubjectView
types.doc: Detailed view of a subject. For record subjects, the author's repo and profile will be returned.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsAccountEvent
types.doc: Logs account status related events on a repo subject. Normally captured by automod from the firehose and emitted to ozone for historical tracking.

fields.name: active
fields.doc: Indicates that the account has a repository which can be fetched from the host that emitted this event.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventMute
types.doc: Mute incoming reports on a subject

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsIdentityEvent
types.doc: Logs identity related events on a repo subject. Normally captured by automod from the firehose and emitted to ozone for historical tracking.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventEmail
types.doc: Keep a log of outgoing email to a user

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Additional comment about the outgoing comm.

fields.name: content
fields.doc: The content of the email sent to the user.

fields.name: isDelivered
fields.doc: Indicates whether the email was successfully delivered to the user's inbox.

fields.name: subjectLine
fields.doc: The subject line of the email sent to the user.

fields.name: severityLevel
fields.doc: Severity level of the violation. Normally 'sev-1' that adds strike on repeat offense

fields.name: strikeExpiresAt
fields.doc: When the strike should expire. If not provided, the strike never expires.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventLabel
types.doc: Apply/Negate labels on a subject

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventDivert
types.doc: Divert a record's blobs to a 3rd party service for further scanning/tagging

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventReport
types.doc: Report a subject

fields.name: isReporterMuted
fields.doc: Set to true if the reporter was muted from reporting at the time of the event. These reports won't impact the reviewState of the subject.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventUnmute
types.doc: Unmute action on a subject

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Describe reasoning behind the reversal.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventComment
types.doc: Add a comment to a subject. An empty comment will clear any previously set sticky comment.

fields.name: sticky
fields.doc: Make the comment persistent on the subject

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventTakedown
types.doc: Take down a subject permanently or temporarily

fields.name: severityLevel
fields.doc: Severity level of the violation (e.g., 'sev-0', 'sev-1', 'sev-2', etc.).

fields.name: strikeExpiresAt
fields.doc: When the strike should expire. If not provided, the strike never expires.

fields.name: acknowledgeAccountSubjects
fields.doc: If true, all other reports on content authored by this account will be resolved (acknowledged).

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsAgeAssuranceEvent
types.doc: Age assurance info coming directly from users. Only works on DID subjects.

fields.name: initIp
fields.doc: The IP address used when initiating the AA flow.

fields.name: initUa
fields.doc: The user agent used when initiating the AA flow.

fields.name: status
fields.doc: The status of the Age Assurance process.

fields.name: attemptId
fields.doc: The unique identifier for this instance of the age assurance flow, in UUID format.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.doc: The date and time of this write operation.

fields.name: completeIp
fields.doc: The IP address used when completing the AA flow.

fields.name: completeUa
fields.doc: The user agent used when completing the AA flow.

fields.name: regionCode
fields.doc: The ISO 3166-2 region code provided when beginning the Age Assurance flow.

fields.name: countryCode
fields.doc: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code provided when beginning the Age Assurance flow.

fields.name: acknowledgeAccountSubjects
fields.doc: If true, all other reports on content authored by this account will be resolved (acknowledged).

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsScheduledActionView
types.doc: View of a scheduled moderation action

fields.name: did
fields.doc: Subject DID for the action

fields.name: action
fields.doc: Type of action to be executed

fields.name: status
fields.doc: Current status of the scheduled action

fields.name: createdAt
fields.doc: When the scheduled action was created

fields.name: createdBy
fields.doc: DID of the user who created this scheduled action

fields.name: executeAt
fields.doc: Exact time to execute the action

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.doc: When the scheduled action was last updated

fields.name: executeAfter
fields.doc: Earliest time to execute the action (for randomized scheduling)

fields.name: executeUntil
fields.doc: Latest time to execute the action (for randomized scheduling)

fields.name: lastExecutedAt
fields.doc: When the action was last attempted to be executed

fields.name: lastFailureReason
fields.doc: Reason for the last execution failure

fields.name: randomizeExecution
fields.doc: Whether execution time should be randomized within the specified range

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventMuteReporter
types.doc: Mute incoming reports from an account

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventPriorityScore
types.doc: Set priority score of the subject. Higher score means higher priority.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventResolveAppeal
types.doc: Resolve appeal on a subject

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Describe resolution.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsScheduleTakedownEvent
types.doc: Logs a scheduled takedown action for an account.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsAgeAssurancePurgeEvent
types.doc: Purges all age assurance events for the subject. Only works on DID subjects. Moderator-only.

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Comment describing the reason for the purge.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventUnmuteReporter
types.doc: Unmute incoming reports from an account

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Describe reasoning behind the reversal.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsModEventReverseTakedown
types.doc: Revert take down action on a subject

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Describe reasoning behind the reversal.

fields.name: severityLevel
fields.doc: Severity level of the violation. Usually set from the last policy infraction's severity.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsAgeAssuranceOverrideEvent
types.doc: Age assurance status override by moderators. Only works on DID subjects.

fields.name: status
fields.doc: The status to be set for the user decided by a moderator, overriding whatever value the user had previously. Use reset to default to original state.

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Comment describing the reason for the override.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsCancelScheduledTakedownEvent
types.doc: Logs cancellation of a scheduled takedown action for an account.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationDefsRevokeAccountCredentialsEvent
types.doc: Account credentials revocation by moderators. Only works on DID subjects.

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Comment describing the reason for the revocation.

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationScheduleActionTakedown
types.doc: Schedule a takedown action

fields.name: emailContent
fields.doc: Email content to be sent to the user upon takedown.

fields.name: emailSubject
fields.doc: Subject of the email to be sent to the user upon takedown.

fields.name: severityLevel
fields.doc: Severity level of the violation (e.g., 'sev-0', 'sev-1', 'sev-2', etc.).

fields.name: strikeExpiresAt
fields.doc: When the strike should expire. If not provided, the strike never expires.

fields.name: acknowledgeAccountSubjects
fields.doc: If true, all other reports on content authored by this account will be resolved (acknowledged).

types.name: ToolsOzoneModerationScheduleActionSchedulingConfig
types.doc: Configuration for when the action should be executed

fields.name: executeAt
fields.doc: Exact time to execute the action

fields.name: executeAfter
fields.doc: Earliest time to execute the action (for randomized scheduling)

fields.name: executeUntil
fields.doc: Latest time to execute the action (for randomized scheduling)

types.name: ToolsOzoneSafelinkDefsEvent
types.doc: An event for URL safety decisions

fields.name: url
fields.doc: The URL that this rule applies to

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Optional comment about the decision

fields.name: createdBy
fields.doc: DID of the user who created this rule

types.name: ToolsOzoneSafelinkDefsUrlRule
types.doc: Input for creating a URL safety rule

fields.name: url
fields.doc: The URL or domain to apply the rule to

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Optional comment about the decision

fields.name: createdAt
fields.doc: Timestamp when the rule was created

fields.name: createdBy
fields.doc: DID of the user added the rule.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.doc: Timestamp when the rule was last updated

types.name: ToolsOzoneVerificationDefsVerificationView
types.doc: Verification data for the associated subject.

fields.name: uri
fields.doc: The AT-URI of the verification record.

fields.name: handle
fields.doc: Handle of the subject the verification applies to at the moment of verifying, which might not be the same at the time of viewing. The verification is only valid if the current handle matches the one at the time of verifying.

fields.name: issuer
fields.doc: The user who issued this verification.

fields.name: subject
fields.doc: The subject of the verification.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.doc: Timestamp when the verification was created.

fields.name: revokedAt
fields.doc: Timestamp when the verification was revoked.

fields.name: revokedBy
fields.doc: The user who revoked this verification.

fields.name: displayName
fields.doc: Display name of the subject the verification applies to at the moment of verifying, which might not be the same at the time of viewing. The verification is only valid if the current displayName matches the one at the time of verifying.

fields.name: revokeReason
fields.doc: Describes the reason for revocation, also indicating that the verification is no longer valid.

types.name: ToolsOzoneVerificationGrantVerificationsGrantError
types.doc: Error object for failed verifications.

fields.name: error
fields.doc: Error message describing the reason for failure.

fields.name: subject
fields.doc: The did of the subject being verified

fields.name: handle
fields.doc: Handle of the subject the verification applies to at the moment of verifying.

fields.name: subject
fields.doc: The did of the subject being verified

fields.name: createdAt
fields.doc: Timestamp for verification record. Defaults to current time when not specified.

fields.name: displayName
fields.doc: Display name of the subject the verification applies to at the moment of verifying.

types.name: ToolsOzoneVerificationRevokeVerificationsRevokeError
types.doc: Error object for failed revocations

fields.name: uri
fields.doc: The AT-URI of the verification record that failed to revoke.

fields.name: error
fields.doc: Description of the error that occurred during revocation.

fields.name: recIdStr
fields.doc: Snowflake for this recommendation, use when submitting recommendation events.

fields.name: token
fields.doc: JWT to be used in a call to `app.bsky.contact.importContacts`. It is only valid for a single call.

fields.name: id
fields.doc: The ID of the created draft.

fields.name: isValid
fields.doc: Indicates whether the feed generator service is compatible with the record declaration.

fields.name: isOnline
fields.doc: Indicates whether the feed generator service has been online recently, or else seems to be inactive.

fields.name: reqId
fields.doc: Unique identifier per request that may be passed back alongside interactions.

fields.name: recIdStr
fields.doc: Snowflake for this recommendation, use when submitting recommendation events.

fields.name: handleIsCorrect
fields.doc: Indicates if handle is currently valid (resolves bi-directionally)

types.name: ComAtprotoServerCreateAccountResponse
types.doc: Account login session returned on successful account creation.

fields.name: did
fields.doc: The DID of the new account.

fields.name: status
fields.doc: If active=false, this optional field indicates a possible reason for why the account is not active. If active=false and no status is supplied, then the host makes no claim for why the repository is no longer being hosted.

fields.name: inviteCodeRequired
fields.doc: If true, an invite code must be supplied to create an account on this instance.

fields.name: phoneVerificationRequired
fields.doc: If true, a phone verification token must be supplied to create an account on this instance.

fields.name: status
fields.doc: If active=false, this optional field indicates a possible reason for why the account is not active. If active=false and no status is supplied, then the host makes no claim for why the repository is no longer being hosted.

fields.name: signingKey
fields.doc: The public key for the reserved signing key, in did:key serialization.

fields.name: rev
fields.doc: Optional field, the current rev of the repo, if active=true

fields.name: status
fields.doc: If active=false, this optional field indicates a possible reason for why the account is not active. If active=false and no status is supplied, then the host makes no claim for why the repository is no longer being hosted.
